message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="green" summary="CSS clean, will update skip link color later">
Thanks for the confirmation. All clear on my end -- `static/css/main.css` has no uncommitted changes. The uncommitted files are all Rust/template work from teammates on Task 9 (delete feature).

Noted on Steve's skip link color preference (primary blue + white text). I'll update that as a small separate commit when there's a natural break. It's a two-property change:
```css
background-color: var(--color-primary);
color: white;
```

Not blocking anything so I'll slot it in next time I touch the CSS.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged. Skip link color update is non-blocking, can be done whenever convenient. Focused on the checkbox semantics fix for Task #8.
